en.extract:
The blue-shouldered robin-chat (Cossypha cyanocampter) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''blue-shouldered robin-chat''' ('''''Cossypha cyanocampter''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]]. It is widespread across the [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
